chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-2947 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 18-08-2020 Mr. Junaid Soomro advocate for petitioner. Mr. Imran Qureshi advocate for respondents No.5&6. Mr. Zaheeruddin Sahito, advocate for SBCA. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro Additional Advocate General. Tariq Memon City Surveyor on behalf of A.C. Hyderabad. Muhammad Rafique SHO P.S. Forte Hyderabad. = Through this constitutional petition the petitioner has prayed that respondent No.11 (Kamran Baig) is raising construction illegally/ unlawfully over C.S. No.946 Nalband Gali Ward-D, Hyderabad. It is stated by learned counsel for SBCA that respondent No.11 has already submitted existing building plan for approval. It is also stated that 4/ 5 months have already been passed but no order has been passed on the existing building plan already submitted by respondent No.11. It appears that it is a case of alleged illegal construction over the subject plot. Under the circumstances, respondents No.3 & 4 are directed to take action if the respondent No.11 is taking/ raising illegal construction over subject plot in accordance with law and compliance report be submitted to this Court. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
